name: 4-1/2" Angle Grinder 11A
tagline: Professional 4-1/2 inch angle grinder with 11 Amp motor and paddle switch for safe operation. Delivers 11,000 RPM no-load speed for cutting, grinding, and surface preparation. Features a lightweight design with vibration-reducing handle for comfortable extended use.
description: Professional 4-1/2 inch angle grinder with 11 Amp motor and paddle switch for safe operation. Delivers 11,000 RPM no-load speed for cutting, grinding, and surface preparation. Features a lightweight design with vibration-reducing handle for comfortable extended use.
userBenefits: 11 Amp motor delivers aggressive cutting and grinding power for demanding jobsite tasks
Paddle switch with lock-off prevents accidental start-ups for enhanced operator safety
Lightweight 4.0 lbs design reduces fatigue during prolonged overhead and vertical grinding
Adjustable aluminum wheel guard allows quick repositioning without tools for cut or grind mode
Spindle lock enables fast, easy disc changes to minimize downtime between tasks
